docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-06-2009 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID HUARD. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
